Politics.headline: Iran's Khamenei killed in U.S.-Israeli strikes after nearly 40-year reign
Politics.detail: President Trump posted on social media that Iranian Supreme Leader Ayatollah Ali Khamenei had been killed after a massive U.S. and Israeli military operation​ Saturday.

Politics.headline: US-Israel attacks on Iran, day 2: Khamenei is killed, Iran retaliates
Politics.detail: Following the killing of Ayatollah Ali Khamenei, Iran is retaliating.

Politics.headline: Trump administration labels Iran a state sponsor of wrongful detention
Politics.detail: Ahead of military strikes, the U.S. issued a designation that enables punishing Iran for detaining Americans for political leverage.

Politics.headline: Argentina Senate approves contentious Milei-backed labour reforms
Politics.detail: The Argentina Senate has approved contentious Milei-backed labour reforms.

Politics.headline: Canada should not have an election before reviewing CUSMA trade deal, says Poilievre
Politics.detail: Conservative Leader Pierre Poilievre says Canada should not have an election before it reviews the Canada-U.S.-Mexico Agreement (CUSMA) this year — and instead he's reiterating his proposal the Carney government set up an all-party committee on the matter.

Finance & Economy.headline: Preparing for potential economic challenges due to Middle East unrest: Finance Ministry
Finance & Economy.detail: The Maldives' Ministry of Finance is closely monitoring the financial and economic situation in light of escalating tensions in the Middle East, which are disrupting air travel and trade, especially impacting the tourism sector due to flight cancellations from Middle Eastern destinations. The ministry is preparing for potential emergencies, working to ensure continuous fuel supply, and considering response measures, supported by the country's relatively high reserves.

Finance & Economy.headline: Trump's Iran strikes risk hitting American pocketbooks if they last
Finance & Economy.detail: President Trump is gambling that his attack on Iran will not cause Americans serious economic pain, however, oil prices are likely to rise and shipping disruptions could make other goods more expensive, hitting American pocketbooks and derailing expectations of an acceleration in U.S. economic growth. A sustained conflict could rattle Wall Street and disrupt oil supplies.

Finance & Economy.headline: New GDP series upgrades FY26 growth to 7.6%, but lowers size of India's economy
Finance & Economy.detail: India's new GDP series upgrades FY26 growth to 7.6%, but lowers the overall size of the Indian economy. With new data sources and process upgrades, the new GDP data set is designed to capture the economy more accurately.

Finance & Economy.headline: PFRS 18: Confidently navigating changes in financial reporting
Finance & Economy.detail: The introduction of PFRS 18 brings a shake-up in financial reporting, potentially changing how entities present their financial story. Companies should proactively engage with stakeholders to discuss the standard's impact on their financial reporting.

Finance & Economy.headline: Weekly Global Economic Update | Deloitte Insights
Finance & Economy.detail: The US Supreme Court disrupted the global trade regime by ruling that the US tariffs implemented on the basis of a national emergency are unlawful. US GDP growth decelerated, and consumer spending grew slowly while inflation accelerated.

Technology.headline: I tested Xiaomi's matte-glass tablet for a month, and it effectively replaced my iPad
Technology.detail: After a month of testing, the reviewer found that Xiaomi's matte-glass tablet effectively replaced their iPad.

Technology.headline: This 3-in-1 adapter for the Starlink Mini made all the difference for its power delivery
Technology.detail: A reviewer highlights how a specific 3-in-1 adapter significantly improved the power delivery of the Starlink Mini.

Technology.headline: I bought this inflatable solar-powered lantern on a whim - here's how it comes in handy
Technology.detail: The author discusses the unexpected usefulness of an inflatable, solar-powered lantern they purchased.

Technology.headline: Best of MWC 2026: Live updates on phones, concepts, and robots we're seeing in 58 seconds.
Technology.detail: Live updates on phones, concepts, and robots at MWC 2026.

Technology.headline: I held the thinnest foldable phone at MWC 2026, and it sets a satisfying new standard in 39 seconds.
Technology.detail: A new standard is set for foldable phones at MWC 2026.

Science.headline: For the First Time, Light Mimics a Nobel Prize Quantum Effect
Science.detail: Scientists have achieved a breakthrough by making light mimic the quantum Hall effect, a phenomenon that has long been considered beyond reach.

Science.headline: Jupiter's Moons May Have Formed with the Ingredients for Life
Science.detail: Research suggests that Jupiter's icy moons might have been formed with the necessary chemical components for life from the very beginning.

Science.headline: PFAS exposure greater in wet pet food, study suggests
Science.detail: A recent study indicates that wet pet food may contain higher levels of PFAS, potentially exposing pets to these chemicals.

Science.headline: A Migraine Is Not Just a Headache: The 4 Distinct Stages Explained
Science.detail: An article discusses the four distinct stages of a migraine, highlighting that it is more than just a headache.

Science.headline: New GLP-1 pill helps patients lose up to 8% of body weight, trial shows
Science.detail: A new study reveals that a GLP-1 pill has shown promise in helping patients achieve up to 8% body weight loss.

Health.headline: How the Body Really Ages: 7 Million Cells Mapped Across 21 Organs
Health.detail: Scientists have created a detailed cellular atlas showing how aging affects the body's organs, revealing that aging begins earlier than previously thought and occurs in a coordinated manner throughout the body. The study examined nearly 7 million cells across 21 organs to reach this conclusion.

Health.headline: Scientists Discover a Bacterial Kill Switch and It Could Change the Fight Against Superbugs
Health.detail: Researchers have discovered that viruses can disable a key bacterial function, offering a potential new approach to combat drug-resistant bacteria, which are becoming increasingly difficult to treat. This finding may lead to the development of novel antibiotic targets.

Health.headline: Your Morning Coffee Could One Day Help Fight Cancer
Health.detail: Scientists at Texas A&M are exploring the use of caffeine combined with CRISPR gene editing to create a system that allows cells to be programmed in advance and then activated, offering a potential high-tech approach to cancer treatment. This involves turning a daily pick-me-up into a medical tool.

Health.headline: Medical oxygen scarce in Africa, Latin America amid virus
Health.detail: A crisis involving the supply of medical oxygen for coronavirus patients has impacted nations in Africa and Latin America, where the shortage has reportedly led to unnecessary deaths. Warnings were unheeded at the start of the pandemic.

Health.headline: New guidelines outline comprehensive care for acute pulmonary embolism
Health.detail: New medical guidelines have been released that outline comprehensive care for acute pulmonary embolism. These guidelines aim to standardize and improve treatment approaches for this condition.

Sports.headline: Robertson's overtime goal caps Stars' 3-2 comeback over Predators for 8th straight win
Sports.detail: Jason Robertson scored in overtime as the Dallas Stars completed a 3-2 comeback victory against the Nashville Predators, marking their eighth consecutive win.

Sports.headline: Falcons dismiss assistant coach LaTroy Lewis, who has been named a suspect in a sexual assault case
Sports.detail: The Atlanta Falcons have dismissed assistant coach LaTroy Lewis after he was named a suspect in a sexual assault case.

Sports.headline: Raptors take control in the second half and hand the Wizards their 4th straight loss, 134-125
Sports.detail: The Toronto Raptors defeated the Washington Wizards 134-125, handing the Wizards their fourth straight loss after taking control in the second half.

Sports.headline: USA Striker Josh Sargent Leaves Norwich For Toronto As Messy Transfer Saga Ends
Sports.detail: Josh Sargent, a US striker, has left Norwich for Toronto after a transfer saga.

Sports.headline: Australian golfer Hannah Green clinches second HSBC Women's World Championship title
Sports.detail: Hannah Green, an Australian golfer, has secured her second HSBC Women's World Championship title, becoming only the third golfer to win the tournament twice.

Entertainment.headline: Shia LaBeouf arrested again on battery charge in New Orleans
Entertainment.detail: Shia LaBeouf, who was charged with battery after police say he punched several people outside a New Orleans bar earlier this month, was arrested again on Saturday.

Entertainment.headline: Sombr BRIT Awards stage invasion was a stunt
Entertainment.detail: During Sombr's BRIT Awards performance, a man wearing a 'Sombr is a homewrecker' T-shirt jumped on stage; representatives later confirmed that the incident was a stunt to promote his new single Homewrecker.

Entertainment.headline: Javed Akhtar says Trump, Israel have overplayed their hand: 'Left no choice to others to react...'
Entertainment.detail: Javed Akhtar shared a post on his X handle commenting on recent US-Israel actions against Iran, stating that Trump and Israel have overplayed their hand, leaving no choice to others but to react decisively.

Entertainment.headline: Netizens slam 'The Kerala Story 2', label it 'religious propaganda' and 'laughable effort'
Entertainment.detail: Early box office trends and theatre attendance suggest that many Malayali viewers have chosen to stay away from 'The Kerala Story 2', with reactions on X ranging from outright dismissal to sharply worded critique for allegedly portraying both Muslims and Malayalis in a negative light.

Entertainment.headline: Vijay Deverakonda and Rashmika Mandanna visit Tirupati after wedding
Entertainment.detail: Vijay Deverakonda and Rashmika Mandanna started their married life on a spiritual note after tying the knot in Udaipur on February 26; they visited Tirumala Tirupati Devasthanams to seek blessings and greeted devotees.

Crime & Justice.headline: At least 3 dead, multiple hurt in mass shooting at Austin, Texas bar
Crime & Justice.detail: Gunfire rang out at a bar in Austin, Texas early Sunday and at least three people were killed and 14 wounded, three critically, authorities said.

Crime & Justice.headline: Repeat offender kills 2 deputies days after $50K bond despite long violent record: police
Crime & Justice.detail: A violent repeat offender with a long criminal history shot and killed two Missouri deputies before being killed in a 30-minute shoot-out with law enforcement, authorities said.

Crime & Justice.headline: Former imam found guilty of multiple rapes and sexual assaults
Crime & Justice.detail: A former Imam has been convicted today (Friday 13 February 2026) of numerous non-consensual sexual attacks on women and girls in East London. Abdul Halim Khan, 54, has been found guilty of twenty one counts of rape and sexual assault as well as child sexual offences against seven women…

Crime & Justice.headline: Man wanted over fatal small boat crossing arrested by NCA
Crime & Justice.detail: A man wanted in connection with a fatal small boat crossing last year has been arrested in Liverpool by officers from the National Crime Agency.

Crime & Justice.headline: Toddler given meth-laced 'sippy cup' suffers 'possible overdose,' 4 adults arrested: Cops
Crime & Justice.detail: Four adults were arrested after a toddler was given a sippy cup laced with methamphetamine and suffered a possible overdose.

Education.headline: UAE schools and colleges go online amid Iran-US-Israel crisis, missile alerts
Education.detail: Due to rising tensions in the Middle East, the UAE has shifted schools and universities to distance learning from March 2 to March 4, 2026, as a precautionary measure to ensure the safety of students and staff. The decision was made in response to regional tensions involving Iran, the United States, and Israel.

Education.headline: President Sheikh Mohamed launches National Education Charter
Education.detail: President Sheikh Mohamed of the UAE has launched the National Education Charter, which defines a unified vision and long-term outcomes for learning in the UAE, establishing a common foundation for the education system. The charter aims to reinforce education as a sovereign priority and a central pillar of human development and nation-building.

Education.headline: CBSE postpones class 10 and 12 board exams in Gulf amid Iran-Israel conflict chaos
Education.detail: The Central Board of Secondary Education (CBSE) has postponed Class X and Class XII exams scheduled for Monday, March 2, across key Middle East centers including Bahrain, Iran, Kuwait, Oman, Qatar, Saudi Arabia and UAE, due to the current situation sparked by US-Israel strikes on Iran. The board is prioritizing student safety amidst closed airspaces, explosions, and military alerts.

Education.headline: Syria suspends schools in southern provinces amid regional escalation
Education.detail: Syria's Education Ministry has suspended classes in all schools in the southern provinces of Quneitra, Daraa and Sweida starting Sunday, March 1, 2026, until further notice, citing safety concerns due to escalating regional tensions. The decision aims to protect students and teaching staff amid prevailing conditions, with debris from projectiles falling inside Syrian territory.

Education.headline: House hearing stresses that AI teacher training is a must
Education.detail: Lawmakers expressed bipartisan interest in a larger federal role in support for AI professional development during a recent subcommittee hearing. The hearing emphasized the necessity of AI training for teachers.

Lifestyle.headline: There's a better way to visit crowded national parks
Lifestyle.detail: Yosemite and other national parks are dropping reservation systems, raising concerns about overcrowding, offering strategies for a more relaxed summer vacation.

Lifestyle.headline: Family of 6 exposes 'insanely expensive' airport food with pizza order, igniting online backlash
Lifestyle.detail: An Oregon mom's airport pizza hack goes viral with 13 million views, sparking heated online debate about the cost of airport food.

Lifestyle.headline: Makeup Mantra: Prajakta Koli reveals her simple makeup routine
Lifestyle.detail: Prajakta Koli shares her makeup secrets in her get ready with me video.

Lifestyle.headline: Fashion's greatest challenges 'inequality and AI', say Prada designers
Lifestyle.detail: Miuccia Prada and Raf Simons discuss the fashion industry's biggest hurdles.

Lifestyle.headline: Woman shares 3 protein-rich dinner recipes that help her keep 'flat tummy at 60'
Lifestyle.detail: Gina shares dinner recipes to wake up with a flat tummy.

Opinion/Editorial.headline: California needs to end its outdated nuclear power plant moratorium
Opinion/Editorial.detail: Fifty years ago, California passed a moratorium on the construction of new nuclear power plants, and it's time to rethink that ban.

Opinion/Editorial.headline: Good news: California is moving its democracy into its bureaucracy
Opinion/Editorial.detail: “Deliberative democracy is now officially entangled in state bureaucracy. And that's good,” Joe Mathews writes.

Opinion/Editorial.headline: Trump's Iran gamble
Opinion/Editorial.detail: It's too early to call the riskiest foreign policy decision of this term a failure or success.

Opinion/Editorial.headline: The FDA shifts the goalposts on rare disease drugs
Opinion/Editorial.detail: The Washington Post Editorial Board discusses the FDA's policies regarding rare disease drugs.

Opinion/Editorial.headline: The US-Israeli war on Iran could rewrite Gulf security calculations.
Opinion/Editorial.detail: A prolonged conflict is bound to disrupt the model of regional stability and economic prosperity the Gulf has pursued.

World.headline: US-Israel war on Iran live: Israel launches wave of attacks 'in the heart of Tehran' as interim successor to Ayatollah Ali Khamenei named
World.detail: Alireza Arafi joins Iran's president and chief justice on temporary leadership council to fulfil supreme leader's role until successor is chosen, amidst ongoing attacks and rising tensions in the Middle East. Explosions have also been reported in Dubai, Bahrain, Jordan and Kuwait.

World.headline: Iran missile strike kills 8 in Israel as Tehran comes under Israeli attacks
World.detail: Following the death of Supreme Leader Ali Khamenei, Iran and Israel have exchanged attacks, with a missile strike in Israel killing eight people. More blasts have been reported in Dubai, Doha, and Manama as Iran targets US assets in the Gulf.

World.headline: Pakistan declares 'open war' against Afghanistan after cross-border attack
World.detail: Tensions between Pakistan and Afghanistan have escalated into open conflict, with Pakistan bombing Kabul after intensifying border clashes. Pakistan's defense minister stated that his country's patience with the Taliban had run out.

World.headline: Hundreds of thousands of travellers stranded or diverted by airspace closures in Middle East
World.detail: Due to the ongoing conflict in the Middle East, hundreds of thousands of travellers are facing disruptions as airspace closures lead to stranding and diversions. Flights from Australia to the Middle East have been cancelled.

World.headline: U.N. nuclear agency to hold extraordinary meeting on Iran on March 2
World.detail: Following recent attacks and rising tensions, the U.N. nuclear agency will hold an extraordinary meeting on March 2 regarding Iran. The Iranian Embassy in India has issued a plea for people not to remain silent after Khamenei's death.

Zimbabwe.headline: Multi-mineral ores targeted . . . Govt moves to plug revenue leakages
Zimbabwe.detail: The government is targeting multi-mineral ores in an effort to plug revenue leakages in the mining sector, ensuring the country benefits fully from its natural resources.

Zimbabwe.headline: New teacher recruitment drive begins tomorrow
Zimbabwe.detail: A nationwide teacher recruitment drive is set to begin tomorrow, aiming to address staffing gaps in schools across the country.

Zimbabwe.headline: RBZ measures put more money back into people's pockets
Zimbabwe.detail: New measures by the Reserve Bank of Zimbabwe (RBZ) are designed to increase disposable income for citizens and stimulate economic activity.

Zimbabwe.headline: Byo police decry surge in rape
Zimbabwe.detail: Police in Bulawayo are expressing concern over a recent increase in reported cases of rape, urging the public to assist with information and prevention efforts.

Zimbabwe.headline: Zimbabwe wins toss and opts to bat against South Africa in Super 8 matchup at T20 World Cup
Zimbabwe.detail: Sikandar Raza won the toss and Zimbabwe opted to bat against South Africa in their final Super 8 game at the 2026 T20 World Cup on Sunday in Delhi, India.
